name: flow-code-hash-downgrade
description: Tier 2: policy is on_nondeterminism=fail, but the code_hash presented on resume differs from the one recorded at first entry (a changed deploy). A code_hash mismatch downgrades fail to warn for THIS handle (a deploy that changed the code is expected to diverge), so the same divergence that would halt with KEEL-E031 under a matching code_hash instead continues live. Stubs skip tier-2 scenarios; the real core runs this in crates/keel-core/tests/flows_conformance.rs.
